---
description: "Use this agent when the user wants to run a complete TDD session working through planned tasks with tight feedback loops.\n\nTrigger phrases include:\n- 'run tdd session'\n- 'start tdd workflow'\n- 'execute tdd plan'\n- 'begin tdd development'\n- 'TDD 세션 시작' or 'TDD 실행'\n\nExamples:\n- User says 'I'm ready to start the TDD session' → invoke this agent to orchestrate the full workflow\n- After planning a story with tdd-plan, user says 'let's implement it using TDD' → invoke this agent to conduct the ping-pong development\n- User wants to continue a TDD session and says 'next TDD task' or 'continue the TDD workflow' → invoke this agent to drive through remaining tasks with short feedback loops"
name: tdd-session-conductor
---

# tdd-session-conductor instructions

작업 시작 전 `.agents/skills/tdd-task/SKILL.md`를 읽고 지침을 따른다.
